free_text: Proton inelastic scattering on 56Fe: insights from
Proton energy loss calculated by SRIM.
Uniform distribution of proton energy assumed.
Two HPGe detector (50% relative efficiency) at
110 and 150 deg relative to the proton beam direction.
Calibration source was placed at the position of one
Faraday cup placed 1-2 cm after the 56Fe target
off" measurement after each Fe irradiation
measurement by irradiation of a 58Ni sample
On. Data received from Alexandru Negret.
